title: Use Custom Timing Window
description: If enabled, uses the custom timing window below. If disabled, automatically calculates based on osu! game mode and OD.

title: Custom Perfect Window (+/- ms)
description: Used only when 'Use Custom Timing Window' is enabled.

title: Show Timing Judgement
description: Enable to show the Early/Late text or images. If disabled, only the Hit Error (ms) will appear.

title: Use Custom Images
description: Load custom image file directly for judgement from plugin folder. Overrides all font settings.

title: Early Image File
description: Use Transparent PNG.

title: Late Image File
description: Use Transparent PNG.

title: Custom Image Size (px)
description: Changes the height of the custom images.

title: Font Size (px)
description: Changes main judgement text size.

title: Judgement X-Offset (px)
description: Move the Timing judgement horizontally.

title: Judgement Y-Offset (px)
description: Move the Timing judgement vertically.

title: Show Hit Error (Early/Late)
description: Show the exact hit error in milliseconds (e.g., +16.67ms) below the judgement.

title: Hide Early/Late Hit Error
description: If enabled, hides the hit error for Early and Late hits only.

title: Show Perfect Hit Error
description: Show the exact millisecond hit error even for Perfect hits.

title: Always Show Hit Error (0ms)
description: Keep showing 0ms even when no note is hit (after the judgement resets).

title: Hit Error Decimal Places
description: How many decimals to show (e.g., 0 for 16ms, 1 for 16.6ms, 2 for 16.67ms).

title: Hit Error Font Size (px)
description: Changes the size of the exact hit error text.

title: Hit Error X-Offset (px)
description: Move the hit error text horizontally.

title: Hit Error Y-Offset (px)
description: Move the hit error text vertically.

title: Perfect Color
description: Color used for Perfect hit error details.

title: Font Name
description: Name font installed on Windows (e.g., Verdana, Arial, etc).

title: Use Custom Font File
description: Load font file directly from plugin folder (e.g., font.ttf). Overrides Local Installed font setting.

title: Use Text Stroke
description: Add a thick black border around the text.

title: Use Fade Out Animation
description: If unchecked, judgements snap disappear instead of fading.

title: Show Duration (ms)
description: Used when animation is OFF.

title: Fade Duration (ms)
description: Used when animation is ON.
